parameters.query: SELECT cl.* FROM contactable_leads cl LEFT JOIN campaign_emails ce ON ce.lead_id = cl.id WHERE ce.id IS NULL ORDER BY cl.created_at LIMIT $1;

nodes.name: Postgres — pick contactable leads (already SUPPRESSION-FILTERED via view)

parameters.query: INSERT INTO campaign_emails (campaign_id, lead_id, template_used, subject, sent_at, status, message_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, NOW(), 'sent', $5);
